description: DIT University operates 15 buses with safety features (fire extinguishers, first-aid box) covering major areas of Dehradun.
route_details: Multiple routes covering Dehradun city. Fee is Rs 22,000 for 10 months.
frequency: Morning and evening trips aligned with college timings

description: Dehradun city buses and Vikram (shared auto-rickshaws) run on fixed routes. Vikram fare is Rs 10-20 per ride.
route_details: City buses from ISBT and Railway Station pass through Mussoorie Road near DIT campus.

description: Auto-rickshaws available throughout Dehradun. Can be hired from railway station, ISBT, or city center to DIT campus.
route_details: DIT is approximately 10 KM from Dehradun city center on Mussoorie-Diversion Road.

description: Ola and Uber available in Dehradun. Local taxis can also be hired. Airport/railway station pickup available on request from university.
route_details: From Jolly Grant Airport: ~30 KM. From Dehradun Railway Station: ~10 KM. From ISBT: ~8 KM.
